title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
